assertions.assertion: Warns against using in-memory stores in production
assertions.rationale: States in-memory stores are 'not suitable for production'.

assertions.assertion: Implements ISamlServiceProviderStore with FindByEntityIdAsync(string entityId, CancellationToken ct)
assertions.rationale: FindByEntityIdAsync is shown but without the CancellationToken parameter.
Uses GetAllAsync returning IEnumerable<ServiceProvider>, not GetAllSamlServiceProvidersAsync with IAsyncEnumerable.
Uses services.AddSingleton<ISamlServiceProviderStore, ...>() instead of the builder extension method.

assertions.assertion: Shows AddSamlServiceProviderStoreCache<T>() for adding HybridCache layer
assertions.rationale: Uses a generic decorator pattern with IMemoryCache, not AddSamlServiceProviderStoreCache<T>().
